---
name: Feature / Subsystem Enhancement
about: Propose structural enhancements or new modular components for Project Rebirth.
title: '[PROPOSAL]: '
labels: enhancement, discussion
assignees: ''
---

**Core Concept Alignment**
Explain how this feature proposal directly honors the "Just Like Home" core philosophy of user autonomy and bloatware elimination.

**Target Subsystem Placement**
Where within the master directory structure does this feature belong? (e.g., `src/CorePC/PackageUnified/`, `src/UI_Components/Widgets/`).

**Technical Design & Execution Strategy**
Provide a highly detailed engineering overview of how this mechanism should behave, including proposed C++ class definitions or WinUI 3 XAML layout adjustments.

**Anticipated Performance Footprint**
Detail the expected impacts on hardware resources (e.g., memory overhead, background processing footprints, or direct NPU reliance).
